name: fx Protocol
description: f(x) splits ETH into a mix of low-volatility “floating stablecoins” called fETH and high volatility “leveraged ETH” tokens called xETH. Users can supply ETH or stETH to mint either one (pure ETH is zapped into stETH before deposit)

name: MoneyOnChain
description: Money On Chain is a self-contained DeFi protocol (a stablecoin, HODL token, leveraging mechanism, and more) which empowers Bitcoiners to improve performance of their assets while also retaining full control of their private keys.
